title: SIM Imaging and Analysis for Active Zone Release Sites in Dopamine Axons
author: Chuyu Chen
materials: Probed with the primary antibodies anti-EGFP (1:1000, Invitrogen), anti-mCherry (1:1000, Invitrogen), and anti-bassoon (1:300, Enzo). 48 to 72 hours at 4°C
Incubated with secondary antibodies—Alexa Fluor‱ 488, Alexa Fluor‱ 568, and Alexa Fluor‱ 647 (1:300, Invitrogen)

steps.title: Adult mice expressing Aldh1a1/Anxa1 Cre and...
steps.instruction: Adult mice expressing Aldh1a1/Anxa1 Cre and FlpO were anesthetized with 3% isoflurane, which was maintained at approximately 1.5% during the procedure.

steps.title: Pain management included subcutaneous injections of...
steps.instruction: Pain management included subcutaneous injections of Rimadyl (3 mg/kg) at the beginning of the surgery, followed by a slow-release injection of Buprenex (0.25 mg/kg) after the surgery, and an additional dose ofRimadyl (3 mg/kg) the following day.

steps.title: A 0
steps.instruction: A 0.5-1 mm hole was drilled into the skull at the stereotactic coordinates of the substantia nigra pars compacta (SNc) (RC: -3.16 mm, ML: -1.50 mm, DV: -4.00 mm).

steps.title: A 0
steps.instruction: A 0.5 µl Hamilton Neuros syringe left in place for 5 minutes after reaching the target depth.

steps.title: A volume of 0
steps.instruction: A volume of 0.3 µl of the viral vector was slowly injected into the SNc over a period of 5 minutes

steps.title: Multichannel SIM images were obtained with...
steps.instruction: Multichannel SIM images were obtained with a Nikon N-SIM Structured Illumination super-resolution microscope with a 100x objective lens (numerical aperture (NA) 1.4).

steps.title: Striatal sections (30 μm ) were...
steps.instruction: Striatal sections (30 μm ) were incubated in 5% goat serum with 0.2% Triton X-100/PBS for 2 hours.

steps.title: Nine images captured with 2D SIM...
steps.instruction: Nine images captured with 2D SIM and reconstructed with 3D SIM to increase xy and z resolution were generated by Nikon Element, and the illumination modulation contrast was set automatically by the software .

steps.title: Crop images using 3D crop function to remove the edges
steps.instruction: Crop images using 3D crop function to remove the edges. (resolution 1950x1950 was applied for further analysis with Imaris 10.1.

steps.title: Use the surface creation tool for...
steps.instruction: Use the surface creation tool for bassoon particles and axons segmentation.

steps.title: Axons segmentation
steps.instruction: Axons segmentation: the smoothing surface detail option was enabled (Surface Grain Size = 0.0643µm). Background subtraction was performed using local contrast with a diameter of "Largest Sphere" set to 0.241µm

steps.title: Apply auto-threshold value with user adjustments made as required
steps.instruction: Apply auto-threshold value with user adjustments made as required. Set the filter “Number of Voxels Img=1” above the lower automatic threshold.

steps.title: Remove the fluorescence signal outside the surface
steps.instruction: Remove the fluorescence signal outside the surface: “Mask channel” function, selecting the corresponding channel for either the Alexa488 (EGFP) or Alexa568 (mCherry), set the voxel intensity outside the surface to 0.

steps.title: Measure the axonal terminal segments' length with filaments tool
steps.instruction: Measure the axonal terminal segments' length with filaments tool. In the tool wizard, the source channel for axonal terminal segments was again selected corresponding to the masked Alexa488 (EGFP) or masked Alexa568 (mCherry), with the seed points threshold set at 6,000.

steps.title: Perform machine learning pixel classification
steps.instruction: Perform machine learning pixel classification. Discard unwanted segments (not overlapping with surface) while keeping segments that overlapped with the surface until they covered over 99% of visible surface

steps.title: Bassoon particles segmentation
steps.instruction: Bassoon particles segmentation: smoothing surface detail was activated (Surface Grain Size = 0.06µm).

steps.title: An auto-threshold value was applied with user adjustments as required
steps.instruction: An auto-threshold value was applied with user adjustments as required. Region Growing Estimated Diameter was set to 0.100 µm based on intensity.

steps.title: Filter “quality” was set to automatic...
steps.instruction: Filter “quality” was set to automatic thresholds, Filter “volume” was set to between 0.003-0.04 µm 3 .

steps.title: Bassoon particle with filter "overlapped volume...
steps.instruction: Bassoon particle with filter "overlapped volume ratio to surface EGFP/mCherry" was set above 1.0.

steps.title: The number of bassoon objects, their...
steps.instruction: The number of bassoon objects, their volume, and the length of axon terminal segments were automatically measured and calculated.

steps.title: 5-minute wait to allow for proper...
steps.instruction: 5-minute wait to allow for proper viral diffusion within the brain parenchyma.

steps.title: a 1:1 mixture of AAV8 hSyn-Con/Fon-YFP (Addgene #55650, titer: 2
steps.instruction: a 1:1 mixture of AAV8 hSyn-Con/Fon-YFP (Addgene #55650, titer: 2.4x10¹³ GC/ml) and AAV8 Ef1a-Coff/Fon-mCherry (Addgene #137134, titer: 2.2x10¹³ GC/ml) delivered unilaterally for imaging experiments

steps.title: washe with PBS for 5 minutes x2
steps.instruction: washe with PBS for 5 minutes x2

steps.title: washe with PBS for 5 minutes x2
steps.instruction: washe with PBS for 5 minutes x2

steps.title: Apply resolution of 1950 x 1950 with Imaris 10
steps.instruction: Apply resolution of 1950 x 1950 with Imaris 10.1.

steps.title: Density calculations were performed in Excel...
steps.instruction: Density calculations were performed in Excel using the number of bassoon objects relative to the total length of axonal terminal segments, with bassoon object number and axonal terminal segments length determined in Excel.

description: Background subtraction (local contrast) (Diameter of Largest Sphere =0.15µm) was employed
